# Activity Log

## Documentation Sets

- [Activity Log](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/llms-full.txt)

## Docs

- [Installation](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/getting-started/installation.md): Install and migrate the package.
- [Quick Start](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/getting-started/quick-start.md): Wire HasTimeline and render the timeline.
- [Core Concepts](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/essentials/core-concepts.md): Builder, sources, entries, and renderers.
- [Data Sources](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/essentials/data-sources.md): Compose sources for your timeline.
- [Refining the Timeline](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/essentials/refining-the-timeline.md): Filters, sorting, and deduplication.
- [Components](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/essentials/components.md): Infolist component, relation manager, and header action.
- [Custom Renderers](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/customization/custom-renderers.md): Register renderers per event or type.
- [Caching](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/customization/caching.md): Opt-in per-call caching.
- [Configuration](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/customization/configuration.md): All config keys at a glance.
- [Tailwind](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/customization/tailwind.md): Register plugin views in your theme.
- [Performance Notes](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/advanced/performance.md): Over-fetch buffer, eager-loading, index tips.
- [Testing](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/advanced/testing.md): Run the package test suite locally.
- [Contributing](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/community/contributing.md): How to contribute to Activity Log
- [License](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/community/license.md): MIT License terms and what it means for you

## Landing

- [Filament Activity Timeline](https://relaticle.github.io/activity-log/raw/index.md): Unified chronological timeline for any Eloquent model, powered by spatie/laravel-activitylog and Filament v5.
